long_name: Ice Sheet Temperature at Top of Ice Sheet Model
description: quantity averaged over ice sheet only, to avoid contamination from other surfaces (eg: permafrost)
quantity averaged over ice sheet (grounded ice sheet and floating ice shelf) only. Needed to analyse the impact of downscaling methods
quantity averaged over ice_sheet (meaning grounded ice sheet and floating ice shelf) only, to avoid contamination from other surfaces (eg: permafrost)
